description: The AWS::Timestream::InfluxDBInstance resource creates an InfluxDB instance.

Tag.description: A key-value pair to associate with a resource.

Value.description: The value for the tag. You can specify a value that is 0 to 256 Unicode characters in length and cannot be prefixed with aws:. You can use any of the following characters: the set of Unicode letters, digits, whitespace, _, ., /, =, +, and -.
Value.markdownDescription:
The value for the tag. You can specify a value that is 0 to 256 Unicode characters in length and cannot be prefixed with aws:. You can use any of the following characters: the set of Unicode letters, digits, whitespace, _, ., /, =, +, and -. 

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption

Key.description: The key name of the tag. You can specify a value that is 1 to 128 Unicode characters in length and cannot be prefixed with aws:. You can use any of the following characters: the set of Unicode letters, digits, whitespace, _, ., /, =, +, and -.
Key.markdownDescription:
The key name of the tag. You can specify a value that is 1 to 128 Unicode characters in length and cannot be prefixed with aws:. You can use any of the following characters: the set of Unicode letters, digits, whitespace, _, ., /, =, +, and -. 

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Update requires: No interruption

Tag.markdownDescription:
A key-value pair to associate with a resource.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

MaintenanceSchedule.description: The maintenance schedule for the InfluxDB instance.

Timezone.description: The IANA timezone identifier for the maintenance schedule.
Timezone.markdownDescription:
The IANA timezone identifier for the maintenance schedule.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 64  
Pattern: ^(UTC|[A-Za-z_]+/[A-Za-z0-9_]+(/[A-Za-z0-9_]+)?)$  
Update requires: No interruption

PreferredMaintenanceWindow.description: The preferred maintenance window in format ddd:HH:MM-ddd:HH:MM.
PreferredMaintenanceWindow.markdownDescription:
The preferred maintenance window in format ddd:HH:MM-ddd:HH:MM.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 19  
Pattern: ^$|^(Mon|Tue|Wed|Thu|Fri|Sat|Sun):([01]\d|2[0-3]):[0-5]\d-(Mon|Tue|Wed|Thu|Fri|Sat|Sun):([01]\d|2[0-3]):[0-5]\d$  
Update requires: No interruption

MaintenanceSchedule.markdownDescription:
The maintenance schedule for the InfluxDB instance.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

Organization.description: The organization for the InfluxDB instance.
Organization.markdownDescription:
The organization for the InfluxDB instance.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 64  
Update requires: Replacement

InfluxAuthParametersSecretArn.description: The Auth parameters secret Amazon Resource name (ARN) that is associated with the InfluxDB instance.
InfluxAuthParametersSecretArn.markdownDescription:
The Auth parameters secret Amazon Resource name (ARN) that is associated with the InfluxDB instance.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:[a-z]*:secretsmanager:[a-z\-0-9]*:[0-9]*:secret:[a-zA-Z0-9\-]*  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Port.description: The port number on which InfluxDB accepts connections.
Port.markdownDescription:
The port number on which InfluxDB accepts connections.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption

DbInstanceType.description: The compute instance of the InfluxDB instance.
DbInstanceType.markdownDescription:
The compute instance of the InfluxDB instance.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: db.influx.medium | db.influx.large | db.influx.xlarge | db.influx.2xlarge | db.influx.4xlarge | db.influx.8xlarge | db.influx.12xlarge | db.influx.16xlarge | db.influx.24xlarge  
Update requires: No interruption

VpcSubnetIds.description: A list of EC2 subnet IDs for this InfluxDB instance.

items.markdownDescription:

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption

VpcSubnetIds.markdownDescription:

DeploymentType.markdownDescription:

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: SINGLE_AZ | WITH_MULTIAZ_STANDBY  
Update requires: No interruption

Name.description: The unique name that is associated with the InfluxDB instance.
Name.markdownDescription:
The unique name that is associated with the InfluxDB instance.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 3  
Maximum Length: 40  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*(-[a-zA-Z0-9]+)*$  
Update requires: Replacement

The connection endpoint for the InfluxDB instance.
